title: Beta Overhauled
description: This texturepack aimes to make Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 more modern in terms of visuals.
body:
![Beta Overhauled - Poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/333adda8363de8bb4ba909d25cdbb9842ab8f218.png)

**"Beta Overhauled"** is a texturepack aimed to upgrade visual aspect of Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 by making textures more colourful and modern.

Here's some comparison screenshots:

![Comparison-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21011b168d6e1f6878beff0bf7669d8882f40142.png)

![Comparison-2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ed9572c19836b8b61eb0212ea316c3687b66433.png)

Tools:

![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad6e164ca141f6098ad8d9ce50392f4c79a6e952.png)

Currently "Beta Overhauled" is being under development. This means that some textures might be missing or unfinished.
